hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(cat)
if [ "$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi

FAILED=0

# TypeScript backend
if [ -d "backend" ]; then
  BE=$(cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || true)
  if [ "$BE" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "" >&2
    echo "===== STOP HOOK: BACKEND TS ERRORS ($BE) =====" >&2
    cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -25 >&2
    FAILED=1
  fi
fi

# TypeScript frontend
if [ -d "frontend" ]; then
  FE=$(cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS' || true)
  if [ "$FE" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "" >&2
    echo "===== STOP HOOK: FRONTEND TS ERRORS ($FE) =====" >&2
    cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -25 >&2
    FAILED=1
  fi
fi

# ESLint backend
if [ -d "backend" ]; then
  LINT_OUT=$(cd backend && npm run lint 2>&1)
  LINT_ERR=$(echo "$LINT_OUT" | grep -cE '\d+ error' || true)
  if [ "$LINT_ERR" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "" >&2
    echo "===== STOP HOOK: ESLINT ERRORS =====" >&2
    echo "$LINT_OUT" | tail -10 >&2
    FAILED=1
  fi
fi

if [ "$FAILED" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "" >&2
  echo "BLOCCATO: Fixa tutti gli errori sopra prima di finire." >&2
  exit 2
fi
exit 0

Stop.description: BLOCCA se TypeScript o ESLint hanno errori in backend/frontend

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(cat)
FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null)
CONTENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_str // empty' 2>/dev/null)

# Guard 1: Block mock/demo data in API routes
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'app/api/.*route\.ts'; then
  if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE 'DEMO_DATA|demoData|mockData|isDemoMode|demo.mode|getDemoData|fakeDat'; then
    jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"VIETATO: mock/demo data nelle route API. Usa SOLO proxy diretto al backend NestJS reale."}}'
    exit 0
  fi
fi

# Guard 2: Block @ts-ignore / @ts-expect-error
if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '@ts-ignore|@ts-expect-error'; then
  jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"VIETATO: @ts-ignore/@ts-expect-error. Fixa il tipo correttamente."}}'
  exit 0
fi

# Guard 3: Block console.log in production code
if echo "$FILE" | grep -qvE '\.(spec|test)\.ts'; then
  if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'console\.log\('; then
    jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"deny",permissionDecisionReason:"VIETATO: console.log in production. Usa Logger del framework (this.logger.log/warn/error)."}}'
    exit 0
  fi
fi

exit 0

PreToolUse.description: BLOCCA scrittura di mock data, @ts-ignore, console.log in produzione

hooks.command:
#!/bin/bash
COMMAND=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command')

# Block push to main/master
if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*\s+(main|master)'; then
  echo "BLOCCATO: push diretto a main/master vietato. Usa un feature branch." >&2
  exit 2
fi

exit 0

#!/bin/bash
INPUT=$(cat)
FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null)
[ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0
[ ! -f "$FILE" ] && exit 0

# Auto-format with Prettier if applicable
EXT="${FILE##*.}"
case "$EXT" in
  ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)
    npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
    ;;
esac

# Log file change
mkdir -p .claude/logs 2>/dev/null
echo "[$(date -Iseconds)] EDIT: $FILE" >> .claude/logs/file-changes.log
exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Prettier + log ogni file modificato
